title: XjMVVM Production Reboot
subtitle: A source-backed implementation notebook for one-repo MVVM, PocketBase, SQLite, and desktop-first Xojo apps

parts.label: Part 1
parts.title: Implementation Cycle
parts.desc: The first visible slice: documentation system, architecture boundary, and backend loop.

chapters.title: First Implementation Cycle
chapters.sub: How the reboot starts without disturbing the existing Xojo source

chapters.title: MVVM Core Map
chapters.sub: Shared ViewModels and repository interfaces across desktop and mobile

chapters.title: PocketBase Loop
chapters.sub: Stock PocketBase as the default REST backend adapter target

chapters.title: PocketBase Adapter Proof
chapters.sub: A compile-checked REST repository path behind the shared Customer ViewModels

chapters.title: URLConnection Transport
chapters.sub: Concrete Xojo HTTP transport for the PocketBase repository adapter

chapters.title: PocketBase Smoke Harness
chapters.sub: Disposable stock PocketBase proof for the Customer records contract

chapters.title: SQLite Customer Repository
chapters.sub: Local Customer persistence behind the same MVVM repository contract

chapters.title: Repository Composition
chapters.sub: Factory helpers that choose fake, SQLite, or PocketBase adapters at the app boundary

chapters.title: Production PocketBase
chapters.sub: Authenticated owner-only Customer schema, rules, smoke proof, and Xojo auth helpers
